pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **Zach's Mustard Boy outfit ain't savin' Brazil if his roster choices are any clue — what's next, draftin' Hawaiian Tropic FC?** Brazil's lookin' strong with a solid run in the qualifiers, but Mustard Boy's puttin' his faith in Saudi Arabia like they’re secretly coached by Pep. That pick's about as valuable as an umbrella in a hurricane. Meanwhile, Gunner’s got Morocco, a team that’s shown some grind, but Bubba G's DR Congo pick was straight-up 'cause he thought they'd unveiled Messi's long-lost cousin. I'm callin' it now — Brazil's takin' this one and Zach's gonna celebrate like he planned it all along, bless his heart.

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy Zach Hoping for Swiss Miracle Against Undrafted Qatar
pundit_takes.subtitle: Expert strategy: rely on teams that didn't qualify to not show up.

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G Gunner's Tactical Genius Tested as Morocco Faces Brazil
pundit_takes.subtitle: Sources confirm Gunner plans to yell 'just kick it' from stands.

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper Devin Banking on Haiti to Spice Up Standings
pundit_takes.subtitle: Nothing like a midnight caper with a team from tier four.

pundit_takes.headline: Backpass Assassin Gayden Sends Turkey to Battle Undrafted Aussies
pundit_takes.subtitle: Clearly strategic: play at midnight while rivals are asleep.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach ranks last with 0 points; maybe soccer's not your game, bro.
Rafe's draft picks missed the World Cup; yet he's ranked 3rd. Unreal.
Rafe pulls a dad-take-down on Devin; son is really coming for the throne.
Gunner was favorite until Rafe joined; the kid's a disruptor, no doubt.
